name: GameAssist
description:
# GameAssist

GameAssist is a modular Roll20 Mod/API automation suite for the D&D 5E (2014) character sheet. It combines critical-fumble tools, concentration checks, NPC death tracking and report handouts, and NPC hit-point rolling in one configurable script.

## Quick Start

1. Install GameAssist and its required TokenMod dependency.
2. Create the seven CritFumble rollable tables listed below.
3. Save or restart the Mod sandbox.
4. Run `!ga-status` to check the installation and `!ga-config ui` to open settings.

## Main Commands

- `!ga-status` -- Show a short system check. Use `!ga-status --details` for troubleshooting.
- `!ga-config ui` -- Open the GM configuration menu.
- `!critfumble help` -- Open the CritFumble quick-reference guide.
- `!critfail` -- Open the GM player picker for a manual critical miss.
- `!concentration` or `!cc` -- Open concentration-check controls.
- `!npc-death-report --help` -- Open the NPC death-tracking guide and report controls.
- `!npc-death-audit` -- Check current-page NPC HP against death markers.
- `!npc-hp-selected` -- Roll HP for selected linked NPC tokens.

## Requirements

- TokenMod 0.8.88 is the supported standalone baseline for NPCManager and ConcentrationTracker marker changes.
- StatusInfo 0.3.11 is optional and can provide condition descriptions and menus.
- CritFumble uses these rollable tables: `CF-Melee`, `CF-Ranged`, `CF-Thrown`, `CF-Spell`, `CF-Natural`, `Confirm-Crit-Martial`, and `Confirm-Crit-Magic`.

GameAssist does not create or populate those campaign-specific rollable tables automatically. Features unrelated to a missing optional setup item remain available.

## Documentation

See the [GameAssist README](https://github.com/Mord-Eagle/GameAssist#readme) for complete setup, commands, examples, module settings, upgrade guidance, and troubleshooting.
